name: app-template-worker
description: Cloudflare Worker (Hono) for the AppFactory template — API, auth, webhooks. This manifest holds ONLY the Worker's build tooling (wrangler, drizzle-kit, workers-types) so the native app build never installs it (wrangler pulls `sharp`, which fails to compile on EAS iOS builders). Runtime deps (hono, drizzle-orm, better-auth, @neondatabase/serverless, …) live in the parent app's package.json and resolve via node's walk-up, keeping a single copy of each.
